footer.brandDesc: Trusted healthcare for travelers across India.

home.heroBadge: Validation Stage — Join Our Early Access Waitlist
home.subheadline: CareRoam is building the first verified healthcare discovery platform for travelers in India. Find trusted hospitals, book verified doctors, and get emergency support — in any language.
home.problemTitle: Finding healthcare on the road shouldn't be a gamble
home.problemDesc: When you're traveling and get sick, you're forced to make a critical decision with incomplete information. Is this hospital trustworthy? Will they speak my language? Is the doctor qualified? Can I afford this? These questions are stressful enough at home — they're terrifying in an unfamiliar city.
home.stat1Text: Domestic trips in India annually — most without healthcare support
home.stat2Text: Travelers say finding trusted healthcare is their top concern
home.stat3Text: Languages spoken across India — a critical barrier in emergencies
home.comparisonDesc: Google Maps finds locations. CareRoam finds you the right care — verified, available, and ready for you.
home.comparisonNote: CareRoam complements Google Maps — use both together for the complete travel safety net.
home.featuresTitle: Everything a traveler needs for healthcare
home.featuresDesc: From finding the right doctor to getting help in an emergency — we've got you covered.
home.feature1Desc: Find verified hospitals, clinics, and doctors near you with real-time availability, ratings, and direct booking.
home.feature2Desc: Describe your symptoms in any language and get matched with the right specialist, instantly.
home.feature3Desc: Translate 50+ critical medical phrases into Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, and more — no internet required.
home.feature4Desc: One-tap access to ambulance dispatch, hospital triage, and emergency contact with real-time ETA tracking.
home.feature5Desc: Every hospital and clinic undergoes credential verification, quality scoring, and patient review validation.
home.feature6Desc: Built for nomadic professionals, medical tourists, and families traveling across India.
home.productDesc: Early concept designs of the CareRoam experience — refined with input from 50+ traveler interviews.
home.mockup1Desc: Find hospitals, clinics & specialists near you — filtered by rating, language & insurance.
home.mockup2Desc: 50+ medical phrases translated into 8 Indian languages. Works offline.
home.mockup3Desc: One-tap ambulance dispatch, hospital triage & location sharing.
home.mockup3Sub: Instant help when you need it
home.phoneMockupDesc: Find verified healthcare near you — instantly, in your language.
home.founderStory: CareRoam didn't start in an emergency room. It started while watching travel videos late at night. I've always been fascinated by Indian travel creators who document life on the road across India. The more I watched, the more I noticed a recurring theme: when these travelers needed healthcare on the road, they were on their own.
home.founderMission: I realized that millions of people travel across India every single day, and there is no reliable way for them to find trusted healthcare when they're away from home. So I started building CareRoam. It's a platform designed to help travelers find verified hospitals, doctors, pharmacies, and emergency services anywhere in India.
home.finalCtaDesc: Join 200+ early adopters on the waitlist. Get exclusive early access, provide feedback that shapes the product, and be part of making travel safer for millions.

emergency.title: Emergency Contacts
emergency.subtitle: One-tap access to emergency services across India
emergency.tip1: Stay calm and speak clearly — tell the operator your location first
emergency.tip2: Share your exact location using Google Maps or WhatsApp Live Location
emergency.tip3: Keep your ID, medical history, and emergency contacts accessible
emergency.tip4: If you have allergies or medical conditions, mention them immediately
emergency.tip5: Use the Medical Phrase Translator to communicate if there's a language barrier
emergency.importantInfoDesc: All emergency numbers listed are verified and available 24/7 across India. Calls to 112, 108, 100, and 101 are free from all mobile networks. When calling, stay calm, state your location first, and follow the operator's instructions.
emergency.translatorLinkDesc: Communicate in Hindi, Telugu, and English

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.q1: What is CareRoam and how does it work?
faq.a1: CareRoam is a healthcare discovery platform built specifically for travelers in India. It helps you find verified hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and doctors near your location. You can check real-time availability, read verified reviews, book appointments, and access emergency services — all in one place.
faq.q2: Is CareRoam available in my city right now?
faq.a2: We are currently in validation phase and building our provider network. CareRoam is not yet available city-wide, but we are targeting pilot launches in Mumbai and Bangalore. Join our waitlist to get early access and updates as we expand to your city.
faq.q3: How do you verify healthcare providers?
faq.a3: Every healthcare provider on CareRoam undergoes a credential verification process. We check medical licenses, accreditation (like NABH), patient reviews, and conduct direct outreach to validate service quality. This is an ongoing process as we build our network.
faq.q4: Is my medical data secure on CareRoam?
faq.a4: We take data security seriously. CareRoam uses industry-standard encryption for data transmission and storage. We never share your personal health information without your explicit consent. Our privacy policy outlines exactly how your data is handled.
faq.q5: Can I use CareRoam in an emergency?
faq.a5: Yes. Our emergency coordination feature is designed for urgent situations. One tap connects you to ambulance dispatch (108), national emergency services (112), or nearby hospital emergency rooms. We also provide real-time ETA tracking and location sharing with emergency contacts.
faq.q6: How do I join the waitlist?
faq.a6: Simply click the 'Join the Waitlist' button on our homepage or visit the waitlist page. Enter your name, email, city, and travel frequency. You'll be among the first to know when we launch and get exclusive early access.
faq.a7: We are targeting a pilot launch in Mumbai and Bangalore within the next 6-9 months, depending on partnership acquisition and validation milestones. Join the waitlist for the most up-to-date launch announcements.

investor.title: Investor & Mentor Overview
investor.desc: CareRoam is currently seeking validation, partnerships, mentors, and strategic guidance.
investor.stageDesc: We have a working prototype and are actively seeking hospital partnerships, traveler feedback, and strategic guidance to move toward pilot launch.
investor.visionDesc: To make trusted healthcare accessible for every traveler in India, eliminating the anxiety of finding quality medical care away from home.
investor.problemDesc: Travelers in India struggle to find trusted healthcare during emergencies. Unknown hospitals, language barriers, and lack of verified information lead to delayed or poor care decisions. Hotels and travel agencies lack infrastructure to guide guests to reliable medical help.
investor.market1: India's healthcare market exceeds ₹30+ lakh crore
investor.market2: 500M+ domestic trips taken annually in India
investor.market4: Medical tourism projected to exceed ₹1 lakh crore

investor.ctaDesc: We're always open to connecting with potential mentors, partners, and investors who share our vision of making travel healthcare accessible.
